UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the OmniVid AI application, storing their essential profile information linked to their Google account.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. (Primary Key)

googleId.description: The unique identifier provided by Google OAuth for the user.

email.description: The user's email address obtained from Google.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was initially created.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user successfully logged into the application.

Video.title: Video
Video.description: Represents a single AI-generated video, including its generation parameters, current status, and storage location.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Video entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who initiated the video generation.

originalPrompt.description: The raw text prompt initially provided by the user.

optimizedPrompt.description: The AI-enhanced English prompt used for video generation.

status.description: The current status of the video generation process (e.g., 'completed', 'failed').

storageUrl.description: The secure URL to the generated video file.

thumbnailUrl.description: The secure URL to a thumbnail image of the video.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the video was created.

definition.description: Stores individual video details generated by a user.
